_doc: Per-food NOVA processing-group corrections, keyed by USDA/national-table fdcId. Layered on top of the rule-based estimate in scripts/nova.mjs (override wins) and stamped into usda-foods.json by serializeFoods. Only foods whose name carries no marker the rules can see are listed here — national-table ferments, prepared condiments, ready-to-serve broths, and formulated plant-milk drink substitutes (whose rename to 'Milk, <plant>' strips the signal). NOVA assignment has low inter-rater agreement; these are estimates. Group: 1 minimally processed, 2 culinary ingredient, 3 processed, 4 ultra-processed.

81016023.reason: sake — fermented rice wine (processed alcoholic drink)

171583.reason: vegetable broth, ready-to-serve — processed cooking liquid

2257045.reason: almond drink, unsweetened — formulated plant-milk substitute (ultra-processed)

1999631.reason: almond drink, plain — formulated plant-milk substitute (ultra-processed)

174820.reason: almond drink, chocolate RTD — formulated plant-milk substitute (ultra-processed)

174832.reason: almond drink, chocolate RTD — formulated plant-milk substitute (ultra-processed)

171942.reason: rice drink — formulated plant-milk substitute, hydrolyzed starch (ultra-processed)

1999630.reason: soy drink, unsweetened — formulated plant-milk substitute (ultra-processed)

9000003.reason: plant-based feta — formulated cheese analogue (refined coconut oil + starch), ultra-processed
